core_payload.content:
# Capsule Decomposition Agent

## 1. Role
Capsule Decomposition Agent continuously keeps atoms atomic and hubs bounded as the vault compounds. Structural splitting is a first-class maintenance skill instead of occasional cleanup performed only after ambiguity has hardened.

## 2. Atomization Surface
- stronger automatic detection of oversized capsules and hidden multi-entity blobs
- cleaner split previews that preserve lineage, links, and structural meaning
- tighter cooperation with Review Agent, Branch Steward Agent, and Vault Update Agent
- safer night-shift queues for bounded structural splitting of stale or overloaded capsules

## 3. Operational Consequence
The vault resists blob growth because decomposition pressure is continuous, reviewable, and explicitly routed instead of deferred until structure has already become expensive to reason about.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Capsule Decomposition Agent supports To Dig Deep by insisting that deep structure requires clear atoms and bounded hubs.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Decomposition Agent defines the maintenance lane that keeps atoms atomic and hubs bounded as the vault grows. It covers early detection of overloaded capsules, split previews that preserve lineage and links, safer night-shift decomposition queues, and coordination with review, stewardship, and update agents. The capsule matters because blob growth makes the graph harder to trust and reason about long before a validator can catch it. It turns structural splitting into an explicit, reviewable discipline instead of a late cleanup triggered only after ambiguity becomes expensive.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language so the capsule states present decomposition doctrine directly.
